title: tragacantha atlantica
intro: Tragacantha atlantica, also known as the Atlantic prickly thistle or cardoon thistle, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating gastrointestinal issues and digestive problems due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, Tragacantha atlantica is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
